public_reputation: Curator of a tower-library environment where access, storage, and scholarly quiet are actively governed.
appearance: Tower Curator Lineth Quill usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their tower curator status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Carries the habits of a tower curator whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Crystal Quill.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tower curator in and around Crystal Quill, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystal Quill workable through the obligations of tower curator while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of tower curator credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Crystal Quill.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tower Curator Lineth Quill can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Crystal Quill.
Tower Curator Lineth Quill becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a tower curator.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Tower Curator Lineth Quill is readable as a tower curator tied to Crystal Quill.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystal Quill: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Tower Curator Lineth Quill presents as someone shaped by the duties of a tower curator and the daily pressures of Crystal Quill.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a tower curator, and proof that strangers will not make Crystal Quill harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Tower Curator Lineth Quill refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a tower curator too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Tower Curator Lineth Quill can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tower Curator Lineth Quill adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Tower Curator Lineth Quill always knows more about Crystal Quill than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to tower curator duties in Crystal Quill.
